sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الْأَطْفَالُ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Djeca danas provode dugo vremena ispred ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Children spend a long time in front of screens today.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ أَنْ يُؤَثِّرَ هَذَا عَلَى صِحَّتِهِمْ وَنَوْمِهِمْ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo može utjecati na njihovo zdravlje i njihovo spavanje noću.
sentences.translationEn: This can affect their health and their sleep at night.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْخُبَرَاءُ بِاللَّعِبِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ بَدَلًا مِنِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَوَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci savjetuju igranje u parku umjesto korištenja telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Experts advise playing in the garden instead of using phones.
